name: Instant Coffee-Swiss Style Mocha Mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a bowl and mix well.
2. Transfer the mixture to an airtight container for storage.
3. To prepare one serving, scoop 1 tablespoon + 1 teaspoon of the mix into a cup.
4. Pour 1 cup of boiling water into the cup with the coffee mix.
5. Stir until fully dissolved.
